name: Possible Kerberoasting via Rubeus
description: Kerberoasting attack via popular open-source tool Rubeus is detected.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event: 'Possible Kerberoasting via Rubeus'. Event details: {event_details}

parameters.name: event_details
parameters.description: Details of the detected security event, including the original query information: `norm_id=WindowsSysmon event_id=7 -source_image="C:\Windows\System32\*" image IN ["*\clr.dll", "*\kerberos.dll", "*\cryptdll.dll", "*\dsparse.dll"] | chart distinct_count(image) as dc, distinct_list(image) as images | search dc=4`.
